class.name: SQLiteBlob
class.brief_description: Provides incremental read and write access to a BLOB field.
class.description: Represents a handle to a binary large object (BLOB) stored in a database. This class allows efficient partial reading and writing of large binary data without loading the entire value into memory.

method.name: close
method.description: Closes the BLOB handle and releases any associated resources. The object should not be used after calling this method.

method.name: get_size
method.description: Returns the total size of the BLOB in bytes.

method.name: read_chunk
method.description:
Reads a portion of the BLOB starting at [param offset] and spanning [param length] bytes.
Returns the read data as a [PackedByteArray]. If the requested range exceeds the BLOB size, only the available data is returned.

method.name: write_chunk
method.description:
Writes the contents of [param buffer] into the BLOB starting at [param offset].
Returns [code]true[/code] if the write operation succeeds. Writing beyond the current BLOB size is not allowed.
